HomeResearchServices

Arman Prangere

Researcher · Behavioral Consultant

I help organisations solve problems by researching how people think, decide, and act.

My name is Arman. I hold a B.A. in Social Sciences and a B.A. in Philosophy, and I am currently completing an M.Sc. in Cognitive Science at École Normale Supérieure, Paris. I draw on this interdisciplinary background to help teams understand behaviour, clarify problems, and design systems that make sense to the people who use them.

My research → ·
Projects Work with me →

World Food Programme · Ogilvy Consulting · 2025

Rethinking Nutrition Communication in Bangladesh

Strategic recommendations based on ethnographic research, creative activations with local partners, and the design of a statistical plan and impact questionnaire for monitoring and evaluation.

Citéo · Ogilvy Consulting · 2025

Encouraging 3R Behaviors Among Youth

Literature review and behavioural mapping to promote Reduce, Reuse and Recycle behaviours among 6–18 year-olds.

Meadow Tea · Edinburgh · 2025

Developing a Local Tea Shop

Analysis of a tea shop in Edinburgh and identification of choice overload as a key friction point. Strategic recommendations based on behavioural economics and decision-making neuroscience.
